'''Geffa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] dealer who did business with the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Odanni]]. When he tried to jack up the price of a spice shipment, Odanni had him [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] for his attempted double-cross.
